samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o/declarations/tags_2/sample_001/target.rs:11:14
   |
11 | fn main() -> i32 {
   |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
   |
   = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

error[E0506]: cannot assign to `b.s1p` because it is borrowed
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o/declarations/tags_2/sample_001/target.rs:16:5
   |
15 |     a.s2p = Some(&b);
   |                  -- `b.s1p` is borrowed here
16 |     b.s1p = Some(&a);
   |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `b.s1p` is assigned to here but it was already borrowed
17 |
18 |     if a.s2p.unwrap().v2 != 20 {
   |        ----- borrow later used here
